title: MPC retains MPR at 13.50% - FinancialEDGE
description: The Monetary Policy Committee (MPC) of the Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) after its meeting on November 25th and 26th, 2019 resolved to; Retain the MPR at 13.50 percent; Retain the CRR at 22.5 percent; Retain the Liquidity Ratio at 30 percent; The Asymmetric window at +200 basis point and -500 basis points, around the
html:
The Monetary Policy Committee (MPC) of the Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) after its meeting on November 25th and 26th, 2019 resolved to;

Retain the MPR at 13.50 percent;

Retain the CRR at 22.5 percent;

Retain the Liquidity Ratio at 30 percent;

The Asymmetric window at +200 basis point and -500 basis points, around the MPR.
